update.releaseNotes:
v1.0.0 - Changelog
> [!NOTE] > Jacob-Met custom fork (Trackblazer). Based on upstream v5.6.1.
Adjustments --- - Add Trackblazer failure-mitigation system (Good-Luck Charm vs energy items, pool reserve, Climax force-charm). - Add megaphone summer reserve, surplus burn, and ankle-weight min-gain gates. - Add Reset Whistle priority, post-shuffle recovery, and conservation rules. - Add Wit training rules (skip low-priority, never-click-empty, prefer rest, friendship-bar exceptions). - Add Junior/pre-debut friendship and top-3 main-gain training priority. - Add per-skill hint level targets in skill plans. - Add pause/resume overlay, run summary export, and auto-load Uma preset support. - Add trainer friendship influence scaling and extensive Trackblazer scenario override settings.
Fixes --- - Fix bug where high-failure training could execute without Good-Luck Charm when charm was assumed in analysis but not queued. - Fix bug where Good-Luck Charm min-gain thresholds incorrectly included megaphone bonus in summer. - Fix bug where post-charm training selection could switch away from the intended stat.
